title: Resolution Temporarily Suspending the Implementation of Ordinance No. 2021-2101 Entitled ? an Ordinance Amending Section 1 Paragraph (c) of Ordinance No. 2020-2074, ? an Ordinance Adopting Executive Order No. 217 Series of 2020 Dated November 5, 2020, an Order Prescribing the Guidelines and the Conduct of Funeral Wake or Funeral Vigil in Municipality of Los Baños and Respectively Repealing Ordinance No. 2020-2016? in View of the Conduct of Funeral Wake or Funeral Vigil for Richard Gaylon, Rena
